task: top-N recommendation (mitigating sparsity and cold start)
input: user-item interaction graph and knowledge graph (item-side)
backbone: KGCN (knowledge graph convolution network) + user-based collaborative filtering
loss: not specified (implicitly cross-entropy or BPR from KGCN context)
key_idea: augment KGCN with user-based collaborative filtering to capture user correlations
